name: poke-around
description: Expose your machine to your Poke AI assistant via MCP tunnel

scripts.build:bridge: bun build bridge/poke-bridge.ts --bundle --target=node --outfile bridge/dist/poke-around-bridge.js && cp -R bridge/node_modules/systray2/traybin bridge/dist/traybin
scripts.release: bun run build:bridge && zig build release-all
